user.title: Add Quebec gas station
user.description: Create one Home Assistant sensor for a specific station from the Regie Essence Quebec feed. Use address or postal code when the station name is common. Matching candidates: {candidates}

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the Regie Essence Quebec feed.
error.not_found: No exact station match was found.
error.ambiguous: More than one station matched. Narrow it with address, postal code, or brand.
error.invalid_station: The selected station could not be validated.
